news_signals.title: 2025 was a defining year for Coda. We sharpened our ... - LinkedIn
news_signals.snippet: 2025 was a defining year for Coda. We sharpened our focus, made bold business decisions, and moved faster on what matters most. To close out the year, our CEO Shane Happach shares his reflections and looks ahead. To view or add a comment, sign in. ## More from this author. * ### Volume 18: 2025 in Review - Regulations, D2C, and Growth. * ### Volume 17: From Strategy to Block, to Strategy to Boost.
